name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: On Puritas Ave in Cleveland, Western Union Money Order Only at 17815 handles money orders and check-cashing services with extended hours.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only is located at 17815 Puritas Ave in Cleveland, OH, in a standalone storefront. This check-cashing location on the northwest side of Cleveland operates seven days a week, opening at 8AM on weekdays and Saturdays, and 9AM on Sundays, with closing at 10PM every day. The convenient hours make it accessible for Cleveland residents who need to cash checks or send money orders outside standard banking hours.

This Western Union Money Order Only location offers full check-cashing services, money order sales, and related financial transactions. Call +1 216-267-4630 to verify services or ask about fees and accepted documents. The staff at this Cleveland store can process transactions quickly and answer questions about rates.

If you're in Cleveland and need to cash a check or send a money order, bring a valid government-issued photo ID and your check or money order amount ready. Western Union Money Order Only serves the Cleveland area with reliable, no-nonsense check cashing. This standalone location has been serving locals with straightforward financial services.
pros: Extensive physical network with hundreds of agent locations across the US, including major retailers like Walmart, grocery chains, and bank partners
Established brand with 170+ years of reliability and trust in money transfer services
Multiple service options: domestic/international transfers, money orders, bill payments, cash pickup, and prepaid cards
Online pre-registration available to reduce time spent at agent locations for in-person payment
Same-day or rapid fund availability for recipients at participating locations
Encryption and fraud prevention systems for transaction security
First online international transfer offered fee-free to new customers
cons: Requires in-person visits to agent locations during business hours, limiting accessibility compared to 24/7 digital alternatives
Does not provide currency exchange services at physical locations; international recipients dependent on real-time transfer rates
Pricing varies significantly by transfer method, destination, and payment option with no transparent fee schedule provided on homepage
Current processing delays reported for certain payment corridors (e.g., Orange Wallet in Cameroon)
Money order services still require physical payment and delivery, negating some advantages over checks
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank accounts or digital payment systems
Individuals sending international remittances to family members in countries with limited banking infrastructure
Consumers preferring cash-based transactions and avoiding credit/debit card usage
People needing bill payment services without online banking or automatic payment capabilities
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and those sending international remittances who need physical access to money transfer services and prioritize cash transactions over digital banking. The primary caveat is the requirement for in-person visits to agent locations during business hours, along with variable pricing that may be higher than digital alternatives, making it unsuitable for convenience-focused or cost-minimizing customers with traditional banking access.
services: Domestic in-person money transfers at agent locations
International money transfers with MTCN tracking
Money order issuance and cashing at participating locations
Bill payments (utilities, rent, car payments) at agent locations
Cash pickup for recipients at participating Western Union locations
Prepaid Visa card funding and account access
Online transfer pre-registration with in-person cash payment
Bank partner services at select financial institutions
Retail location services through grocery chains and major retailers
Identity verification and MTCN confirmation for fund pickup
Multiple payment method acceptance (cash, debit, select credit cards)
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 17815 Puritas Ave, Cleveland, OH. Convenient check cashing and money orders open daily 8AM-10PM.
